expectations.text: outputs/repo/web/AGENTS.md includes the serial web test command.
expectations.evidence:
web/ scoped rules

- Use pnpm.
- Run tests serially (shared fixtures): `pnpm --dir web test -- --runInBand`.
- Run `pnpm --dir web test` after changing anything in `web/`.

expectations.text: outputs/repo/api/AGENTS.md includes the schema validation command.
expectations.evidence:
api/ scoped rules

- API contract details live under `api/`.
- After editing `api/schema/*.json`, run: `python3 scripts/validate_schema.py`.
- Use python3 for schema validation and related scripts.

expectations.text: outputs/repo/AGENTS.md is shorter than the source root AGENTS.md and no longer owns the moved scoped commands.
expectations.evidence:
Project uses pnpm and python3.

See web/AGENTS.md and api/AGENTS.md for scoped rules.

Keep root file short.

expectations.text: outputs/report.md includes Moved guidance and Grouped files.
expectations.evidence:
Learnings

- Durable guidance found: web tests must run serially; api schema validation command; project uses pnpm and python3.

Applied updates

- Root AGENTS.md shortened to minimal project-level notes.
- Created scoped AGENTS.md under web/ and api/ with concrete commands.
- Added SELF_IMPROVE_REFERENCE.md summarizing placement and durable-learning filter.

Moved guidance

- Moved test-running guidance into web/AGENTS.md.
- Moved schema-validation guidance into api/AGENTS.md.

Grouped files

- outputs/repo/AGENTS.md (root, minimal)
- outputs/repo/web/AGENTS.md (scoped test rules)
- outputs/repo/api/AGENTS.md (scoped api rules)
- outputs/repo/session_notes.md (original session notes)
- outputs/repo/SELF_IMPROVE_REFERENCE.md (durable-guidance reference)

No other changes made. If nothing else requested, task complete.
